item.title: The sister who reported it found her first
item.description: A missing-person case takes a tragic turn as the timeline of events reveals how the sister who reported it was the first to find her.

item.title: Taken as a baby, found 17 years later
item.description: A missing piece in this true crime case changes everything as a child taken as a baby is found 17 years later.

item.title: A Family Case That Raised Concern
item.description: A look at a case involving a young girl and the concerns raised about her family’s role in her care.

item.title: The Disturbing Case of Trish Haynes
